podcasts.name: Daan Jonkman — AI for Shopify
podcasts.title: Connect Claude Cowork to Shopify in 5 Minutes (Full Setup)
podcasts.transcript: It's finally here. Cloth and Shopify collaborated. They have created their own secure and direct connection inside of cloth co-work and we can instruct CL AI to do basically all admin task for us. What we would normally do in the Shopify admin, we can now instruct this AI to do it on our behalf. Of course, we can set permissions to keep it safe and secure, but now Cloud can also switch between stores. We can add multiple stores in here. We can bulk update things, can basically do anything. So, let's don't waste any time here. Let's um dive straight into it and how we can set this up. We only have to press a few buttons. So, stay along and you have this running for your own store. The first thing that we do is to download the cloth desktop app. You go to claw.com/d download. The link is also in the description here. And you download this for your Mac or Windows. And if we go over to the pricing, we can see that in the free plan, um, Cloud Co-work is not included. So, we need a pro plan. And this starts at 20 a month if you build it monthly. And if you need more credits, then we need to go to the max plan. But to start out, the pro plan is just fine. So when we're inside the cloth app and we're logged in, we can see on the top here three different sections. We see the chat interface. This is just a normal cloth chat interface just like chat GPT or Gemini. Nothing special here. And here we see the codes tab. This is cloth code. You may have know the name already. Cloud codes. It's really powerful. people are spending a lot of money and time in it, me included. Um, and co-work is a nice balance between the nice chat interface of of the chat and the power of cloud code. It's a great combination especially when you want to run analysis, want to run schedule tasks, more on that later. So, we will work in co-work in this one. And to connect it to your Shopify store, we need to press on the plus icon here. We hover over connectors. And here we press manage connectors. And maybe you already have some connectors, but if you just started out, you probably don't see anything yet. Here we add browse connectors. And here you see all your possible software integrations that are already native. So you might recognize uh some softwares in here. In this case, we're going to install Shopify, of course. We press on it. We click on connect. And now it will open up our browser to actually connect it to the right store and to give it access. As we can see, we're connected right now. And now we can see the Shopify connector in here. I've set it up already. So it will ask you to install it inside of Shopify. You just press install. And here we can give it access to certain things. We can completely block things like it just cannot create discounts for example. That's a good one to exclude. We don't want the AI to hallucinate and just create discount when a customer asks for it. We don't want that. So we can block that. But for certain things we can give it full access. So always allow. So this means that cloth doesn't have to ask us for permission. It just has permission. Or we can switch to needs approval. And this means that cloth will ask us am I allowed to execute this step and to have this tool. So I recommend you to go through this whole list and select manually what you want to give it access to and if you run into issues um when you want to update things or create things you can then decide okay maybe I want to give it access to this or only um approval. So this is up to you on how you want to set this up for your own store. Let's go back to the co-work section. We can now see it is connected. So we can start testing this with our real store to get data to update things. So I've made three prompts already. First one is pull yesterday's order plus the last seven days. Give me the total revenue order count AOV top five products, the top five products by revenue, refund rate, etc. Compare this to last week and the changes and flag anything if it looks off. And a nice thing about co-work, we can also add it to a folder. Um, this will work on a specific folder on your computer. So, it doesn't have access to your full computer, just a specific folder where you give it access to. And you can also create a second brain. This will give cloth more context about your business, your ICP, your tone of voice. I also made a video up here. I will link it. And this will give cloth the context to to write for your store like your tone of voice, your ICP. This is um for my demo store, the ICP, the tone of voice and cloth will read these files. it will get this and before it will write content for your store like product um descriptions blog articles it will reference this folder you don't have to set this up this is optional but it gives good context to cloth more on this later in other videos and I also have set up a school community uh which you can join for free now it is still for free and I will dive more in depth on this so let's see what cloth comes up with our prompt. We can see our Shopify analytics here orders. It is still analyzing. So we have to wait. We can also see the progress bar here. This um when we gave the prompt to clot, it first thought of a process. Okay, I need to execute this step and then this step. It broke it down itself. And we can also add comments to here like when something new came up in our mind and we want to flag that. Okay, this actually need to check double check this or be aware that XYZ we can add that by click on the plus icon. So here we have the report that we asked for. Of course, this is a demo account, so on your store, this would probably look different when you run on your live store. And we can also create scheduled tasks. These are cloud co-work sessions that will spin up in the background, but your computer needs to be awake for this. So, we can take the prompt that we just had And here we can paste the actual prompt. We can also give it access to a specific folder that we want it to work in. And we can give it access uh permissions. We can select the model and the frequency. So, let's say we want to run this weekly at 9:00 a.m. Monday to have this weekly report what we just pasted in manually. We can now save this and it will run every Monday at 9:00 a.m. and it will output us the final report. So, you can understand uh the things that you would normally do manually inside of your admin getting all the order information. Now, you can create this into a schedule task. So it will run in the background. If you want to learn more about this and also how you can can connect other tools like Clavio, Meta Ads, Google Ads to pull out more information to make an even better report for you. You definitely want to check out the school community. It is still open, still free. So hope you got value out of this video. Hope you have this running for your own store. And if you have any questions, you can also message me in the community. Hope to see you there. Ciao.
